entities.name: atomic units of experience
entities.context: The building blocks that Careerspan's system should extract from candidates

entities.context: Analogy for separating content (truth) from presentation layer (resume formats)

entities.name: one-page resume

relationships.context: Stories are the manifestation of semantic identity
Story library is composed of atomic experience units
System should prioritize extracting these units
Analogy: content separate from presentation mirrors semantic identity separate from resume formats
Resume becomes output format derived from semantic identity, not source of truth
